resources.string: Bolt Scout reads ride request screens in the Bolt Driver app to show pickup and dropoff locations on a map with a TAKE / SKIP verdict. No data leaves your device.
Warsaw ride analyser for Bolt drivers
Scout is INACTIVE — tap to enable

When a ride request appears in Bolt, Bolt Scout instantly shows both addresses on a Warsaw map and gives you a verdict:

 TAKE IT — short trip, good direction, off-peak or ideal
 SKIP — long trip during peak hours or bad destination
 YOUR CALL — moderate trip, weigh it up

 Peak hours: 07:00–10:00 and 15:00–19:00
 Peak threshold: 8 km straight-line distance
Grant \'Draw over other apps\' so the verdict window floats above Bolt.
